## Type of change

- [ ] New page or guide
- [ ] Update to existing content
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, incorrect info)
- [ ] Structural / navigation change
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is accurate and reflects the current state of the product
- [ ] Links work
- [ ] Added to sidebar / nav if it's a new page
